# Task: Nice-to-have: most-connected node title in carto stats

> Task ID: CART-S02-T03
> Sprint: [CART-S02](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: S

## Description

Nice-to-have, attempt only if T01 and T02 complete. Add a new pure helper in src/store/graph.ts computing node degree from graph.edges (counting from and to, resolving Node id to title) returning the highest-degree node or a defined sentinel (null) when there are no edges. Extend the stats action in src/cli.ts to also print the most-connected node title. Handle empty-graph/no-edges and ties deterministically (first-encountered tie-break). Add vitest unit tests for the pure helper.
